title: Ottawa Public Library Board - April 14, 2026
meeting_location: Champlain Room, 110 Laurier Avenue West, and by electronic participation

agenda_items.title: Notices and meeting information for meeting participants and the public
agenda_items.description: Notices and meeting information are attached to the agenda and minutes, including: availability of simultaneous interpretation and accessibility accommodations; in camera meeting procedures; information items not subject to discussion; personal information disclaimer for correspondents and public speakers; notices regarding minutes; and remote participation details.
agenda_items.minutes:
This draft Minutes document contains a summary of the disposition of items and actions taken at the meeting. This document does not include all of the text that will be included in the final Minutes, such as the record of written and oral submissions. Recorded votes and dissents contained in this draft Minutes document are draft until the Minutes of the meeting are confirmed by the Board. The final draft Minutes will be published with the agenda for the next regular Board meeting and, once confirmed, will replace this document.
Notes:

agenda_items.title: Recognition of the Territory of the Anishinābe Algonquin Nation
agenda_items.minutes: Chair Luloff welcomed member and attendees to the Ottawa Public Library Board meeting and delivered the Indigenous land acknowledgment statement.

agenda_items.title: Roll Call
agenda_items.minutes: The Chair proceeded with roll call by voice in random order.

agenda_items.title: Declarations of Interest
agenda_items.minutes: No Declarations of Interest were filed.

agenda_items.title: Chair's Verbal Update
agenda_items.minutes:
MOTION OPL 20260414/1
That the Ottawa Public Library Board receive the Chair’s verbal update for information.
Results: Received

agenda_items.title: In Camera Items
agenda_items.minutes: There were no in camera items.

agenda_items.title: Adjournment
agenda_items.minutes: Be It Resolved that the Ottawa Public Library Board meeting be adjourned at 6:10 pm.
